title: Intercom MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Intercom MCP Server for Claude
Access customer conversations, tickets, and user data in real-time
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Intercom
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `customer-support` `intercom` `chat` `helpdesk` `crm`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status intercom
```

## Config
```json
{
  "intercom": {
    "url": "https://mcp.intercom.com/sse",
    "transport": "sse"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status intercom

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/intercom-mcp-server
